title: Converting SQL Server code to PostgreSQL
summary: Google Cloud demonstrates using Gemini to convert SQL Server T-SQL code to PostgreSQL, including data type translation and schema migration. The AI provides both code conversion and explanatory tutoring for developers migrating applications to the cloud.
writeup: Google Cloud Tech demonstrates using Gemini to convert SQL Server T-SQL code to PostgreSQL, covering data type translation and schema migration. The video matters for developers moving applications to the cloud who need to reconcile dialect differences between the two databases. Gemini produces both the converted code and explanatory tutoring, so the workflow doubles as a learning aid rather than a one-shot translation.
